# A stale leader's append is rejected by followers who have moved to a higher
# term.
#
# Three voters, no witness. Quorum = 2.

setup
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1]
v3: [a1]
----
v1: [a1] term=a
v2: [a1] term=a
v3: [a1] term=a

# v1 wins election.
campaign v1
----
v1 campaigns at term b
v1: yes (self)
v2: yes
v3: yes
outcome: won

propose v1
----
v1: [a1 b2 b3] term=b leader
v2: [a1] term=b
v3: [a1] term=b

# v2 campaigns with v1 partitioned away. v2 wins with v2+v3.
# v1 still thinks it's leader at term b.
campaign v2 drop=(v1)
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1: (dropped)
v3: yes
outcome: won

# v1 (stale leader at term b) tries to append. v2 and v3 reject because
# they're at term c > b.
append v1
----
v1 appends through b3
v2: rejected, stale leader term b < c
v3: rejected, stale leader term b < c
v1: [a1 b2 b3] term=b leader
v2: [a1 c2] term=c leader
v3: [a1] term=c
